script.hook_line: my doctor said 'everything looks normal' for the third time

second_0_3.name: HOOK — The Frustration
second_0_3.action: Woman on couch or bed, casual home setting. She looks exhausted and frustrated. Not crying, not dramatic — just TIRED of not having answers. Looking at camera with a 'you know what I mean' expression. Slight eye roll or head tilt that says 'here we go again'
second_0_3.text_overlay: my doctor said 'everything looks normal' for the third time
second_0_3.audio: Quiet home ambient. Maybe a sigh
second_0_3.frame_a_expression: Tired frustration. Under-eye circles visible. Lips pressed together (holding back emotion). Brow slightly furrowed. Looking at camera with exhausted directness. NOT sad — frustrated
second_0_3.frame_b_expression: Slight eye roll transitioning to determination. Jaw sets. 'Fine, I'll figure it out myself' energy. Subtle shift from defeated to decided
second_0_3.character_notes: Cozy home clothes. Hair messy but not styled-messy. Genuine end-of-day tired. Maybe blanket nearby. No product yet

second_3_7.name: BODY — Taking Control
second_3_7.action: Cut to: her hands opening the test kit box on a table. Unboxing moment but casual, not precious. She pulls out the finger prick device. Shows how small and simple it is. This demystifies the process — it's just a finger prick, not scary medical stuff
second_3_7.text_overlay: so I tested myself. 88 foods. 4 immune pathways. at home.
second_3_7.audio: Box opening sound. Paper rustling. Quiet, intimate
second_3_7.product_notes: Focus on SIMPLICITY. The box is clean, the contents are organized, the finger prick device is small. This should feel easy, not intimidating. Her nails match the character (imperfect, real). Kitchen table or desk surface

second_7_11.name: PROOF — The Vindication
second_7_11.action: Back to her face. Now she's looking at phone (results). Expression is a mix of vindication and surprise. Eyebrows up, mouth slightly open, nodding slowly. 'I KNEW something was wrong' energy. She might point at the phone screen or hold it up slightly
second_7_11.text_overlay: turns out I had 12 food sensitivities my bloodwork never tested for
second_7_11.audio: Quiet. Her saying 'twelve' under her breath (optional, if we add VO)
second_7_11.expression: Vindication + surprise. Brows raised, eyes wider, slow nod. Mouth forms an 'o' briefly then closes into a knowing press. Head tilts back slightly — the 'I KNEW IT' micro-movement. Not anger at doctor, just relief at being validated

second_11_13.name: RESULT — The Transformation Tease
second_11_13.action: Quick montage feel (even in still frames): her in kitchen making food confidently, or her looking at the color-coded results report, or her looking noticeably more energized (subtle before/after within the same ad)
second_11_13.text_overlay: 3 weeks later: no more bloating, sleeping through the night
second_11_13.audio: Slightly more upbeat ambient. Morning energy
second_11_13.notes: This is the aspirational beat. She looks BETTER — not dramatically, just subtly more alive. Better under-eyes, more relaxed shoulders, genuine energy in eyes

second_13_15.name: CTA
second_13_15.action: Her holding the test kit box, looking at camera with a confident, warm expression. Direct address CTA energy. Text overlay drives the action
second_13_15.text_overlay: covered by most insurance · results in 3-5 days · link in bio
second_13_15.expression: Warm confidence. Not selling — sharing. 'You should do this too' without saying it. Genuine half-smile, direct gaze (still 2 degrees off camera)

shots_needed.description: Exhausted frustration on couch/bed, looking at camera
shots_needed.notes: Cozy home setting. Tired face. Under-eye circles. Frustration not sadness
Subtle shift from defeated to decided. Jaw sets

shots_needed.description: Hands opening test kit box, pulling out contents
shots_needed.notes: Her hands, her nails, table surface. Box opening. Emphasize simplicity. Character's nail details visible for continuity

shots_needed.description: Reading results on phone, vindicated surprise
shots_needed.notes: The 'I KNEW IT' face. Vindication + surprise. Nodding

shots_needed.description: Her looking more energized, in kitchen, morning context
shots_needed.notes: Same person but visibly better. Subtle: brighter eyes, less tension, natural smile. Kitchen morning light

shots_needed.description: Holding test kit, warm confident expression, CTA moment
shots_needed.notes: Confidence, not selling. Genuine recommendation energy
